Analyze: lighting is warm interior overhead, hardwood flooring with natural wood grain, beige/cream walls, slight shadows beneath furniture. Clarify: camera is static, slightly elevated angle looking down into the corner alcove; duration is 5 seconds so actions must be compressed—reach (0:00-0:01), grasp (0:01-0:02), lift (0:02-0:03), rotate and place (0:03-0:05).",
